request_payload.exposure_text: As a fellow concerned citizen, I've noticed how our strategic autonomy efforts are being undermined by those who prioritize short-term gains over long-term security. Just look at how our allies are increasing their defense budgets while some politicians here push for cuts in critical programs. We can't afford to be left vulnerable. It's time to stand firm on strengthening our national preparedness - our safety depends on it. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
